en.extract:
The black-spectacled brushfinch (Atlapetes melanopsis) is a species of bird in the family Passerellidae. It is endemic to Peru.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forest and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss.

The '''black-spectacled brushfinch''' ('''''Atlapetes melanopsis''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Passerellidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Peru]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]] and [[subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland]]. It is threatened by [[habitat loss]].
